title: Finance Manager
metaDescription: Finance Manager role in Singapore: manage the finance function, financial reporting, budgeting, and statutory compliance.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. We are looking for an experienced Finance Manager to join our team in Singapore.
duties: Manage the full finance function including accounting, reporting, and controls.
Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements and management reports.
Oversee budgeting, forecasting, and cash flow management.
Ensure compliance with accounting standards, tax, and statutory requirements.
Lead and develop the finance team and improve processes.
requirements: Degree in Accountancy or Finance; CPA / CA preferred.
6 – 8 years of relevant finance and accounting experience.
Strong knowledge of financial reporting standards and controls.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
